bugs.title: Card serialization showing undefinedundefined
bugs.description: Cards in game state API were showing as 'undefinedundefined' instead of proper card values like 'A♥'. This caused invariant violations for duplicate cards and invalid card format.
bugs.rootCause: Card objects with undefined rank/suit were being concatenated as template literals `${rank}${suit}` without null checks, producing 'undefinedundefined' strings. The invariant monster was then flagging these as invalid/duplicate cards.
bugs.fix: 1. Updated normalizeCardToString() to detect and convert invalid strings like 'undefinedundefined' to '??' (hidden card). 2. Added snake_case field support in parseGameState(). 3. Added extra filtering in poker-invariants.ts to skip cards containing 'undefined' or 'null'.

learnings.detectionCode:
// The fix was applied directly to normalizeCardToString and poker-invariants.ts
// Now handles invalid strings like 'undefinedundefined' gracefully
